name: Terminal Services / RDP Configuration
categoryDescription: Registry keys that cause code to execute at boot, logon, or via Windows subsystem hooks.
description: Controls RDP enablement (fDenyTSConnections), listening port, and GPO-applied settings.
forensic_value: fDenyTSConnections=0 means RDP is enabled. Non-standard PortNumber indicates firewall evasion. Policies subkey reveals GPO-enforced settings.
